data.title: Fed Awaits Clarity Amid Rising Risks, June Rate Cut Unlikely
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Swedish bank Nordea has highlighted that the Federal Reserve is seeking more clarity as risks increase. Both trade policy and economic outlook are considered highly uncertain, prompting the Fed to wait for clearer outcomes. The market interprets this stance as slightly hawkish, reducing the likelihood of a rate cut at the June meeting. While Nordea agrees with this market shift, it anticipates that the Fed will eventually prioritize supporting economic growth over addressing temporary inflation spikes. If long-term inflation expectations remain manageable and aligned with targets, the Fed should be able to overlook the temporary inflation impact caused by tariffs. There is also a possibility that the short-term economic impact of tariff uncertainty could exceed current expectations. However, for now, the Fed perceives limited economic impact from these measures, with some signs of progress in trade negotiations. Inflation remains above target and is expected to rise again due to tariffs.

data.title: AI decentralized apps are coming for the Web3 throne: DappRadar
data.description:
AI decentralized apps (DApps) have seen a spike in user activity and could soon challenge gaming and DeFi for the top spot in the DApp ecosystem, according to blockchain analytics platform DappRadar. Gaming and DeFi are both sitting on 21% dominance in April, judged by percentage of unique active wallets, while AI has climbed to 16%, up from the 11% recorded in the February report, data in DappRadar’s April industry report shows. “As user interest in artificial intelligence tools grows across industries, AI-powered DApps are steadily carving out their place in the decentralized ecosystem,” DappRadar analyst Sara Gherghelas said.  “If this trend continues, AI could soon challenge the traditional dominance of DeFi and Gaming, signaling a new era in the DApp landscape
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ai-decentralized-appscoming-for-web3-throne-dappradar?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Apple makes progress toward its first pair of smart glasses: Report
data.description:
Apple is reportedly working on its own microchips across multiple product categories, including smart glasses and artificial intelligence — a hint at what’s next for the massive Silicon Valley-based tech giant. A May 8 report from Bloomberg, citing people familiar with the matter, said the company is working on new processors to power its future devices, including its first smart glasses to rival Meta’s Ray-Bans, more powerful Macs, and artificial intelligence servers. The smart glasses — a first for Apple — would rely on a specialized chip codenamed N401. The processor is based on Apple Watch chips but is further optimized for power efficiency and designed to control multiple cameras planned for the glasses, the sources said
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/apple-makes-progress-first-smart-glasses-bloomberg?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: OpenAI Enhances ChatGPT Memory Features for European Users
data.description: According to Foresight News, OpenAI has announced the rollout of an improved memory feature for ChatGPT to users in the European Economic Area, the United Kingdom, Switzerland, Norway, Iceland, and Liechtenstein. This enhancement allows ChatGPT to more seamlessly reference previous user interactions, thereby improving the overall user experience. The feature, which was initially launched for users in other regions on April 10, also provides options for users to delete or manage their memory content.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
BTT is officially listed on Bullish Exchange
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BitTorrent native token BTT has been launched on Bullish Exchange at 13:00 UTC on May 8. With its high liquidity and compliance advantages, Bullish will further expand BTT's global coverage.
As the core token of the BitTorrent protocol, BTT drives the world's largest decentralized P2P network, supports high-speed file transfer, and plays a key role in cross-chain scenarios such as the TRON ecosystem. This launch may bring users a more convenient trading experience.

data.title: Zerebro dev is reportedly alive and at parents’ house: SF Standard
data.description:
The 22-year-old developer of Zerebro, who apparently committed suicide during a livestream on May 4, is actually alive, according to a San Francisco news outlet that claims they spoke to Yu outside his family home.  The San Francisco Standard reporter George Kelly claimed on May 8 that he briefly spoke with Yu outside of his family’s two-story home, where the crypto influencer refused to discuss the suicide allegations and whether he had financially benefited from it.  Instead, Yu reportedly said: “You can see the PTSD in my eyes, right?” before asking the reporter to leave. He was reportedly wearing a T-shirt, shorts, flip-flops and wire-rimmed glasses, possibly similar to the ones he had on while appearing to shoot himself to death during the livestream
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/zerebro-dev-jeffy-yu-reported-alive-after-being-spotted-parents-house?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitget Wallet will support Ethereum EIP-7702 proposal to promote wallet intelligence
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 wallet Bitget Wallet announced that it will support the key proposal EIP-7702 in Ethereum's latest system upgrade Pectra, taking the lead in making traditional wallets intelligent. With this upgrade, users can complete multiple transactions at once, pay handling fees with USDT or USDC, and even have a third party pay for Gas without changing their wallets, making the use of Web3 closer to the convenient experience of daily apps.
EIP-7702 not only improves wallet functions, but also brings new security challenges. To ensure user safety, Bitget Wallet has launched an exclusive detection mechanism to help users identify whether the wallet has enabled this function, and provides a one-click unbinding tool to prevent it from being exploited by malicious contracts. Bitget Wallet will continue to optimize functional experience and risk protection to bring a simpler, safer and more efficient Web3 entrance to the public.

data.title: dYdX: Remind users to migrate to ethDYDX as soon as possible, cross-chain bridge support may be terminated

Previously, Nethermind proposed to terminate the cross-chain bridge support of dYdX in about 23 days, and the unmigrated tokens may not be converted at that time.

data.description:

data.title: Whale James Wynn partially closed his 40x Bitcoin long position, with the remaining position worth $57 million
data.description: HyperInsight data shows that the whale James Wynn's 40x Bitcoin long order has been partially closed at $101,500 to $102,500, with a nominal value of about 330 Bitcoins, or about $33 million. The giant whale still holds a long order with a nominal value of 554 Bitcoins, worth about $57 million, and an unclosed profit of $4.73 million. Earlier news, the whale @JamesWynnReal opened a BTC long order worth $137 million on Hyperliquid using 40x leverage in the 40 hours since the afternoon of May 1. The number of long BTCs is 1,419.4, worth $137 million, with an average opening price of $96,629.4 and a liquidation price of $87,844.
